pageContext.name: Web of Venom: Carnage Born #1 (Variant Edition)
pageContext.description: 'There is no right. No wrong. No black or white. There is only life and death. Blood and the abyss. The universe is black and red. Truth is chaos... God is carnage.' —Scorn  Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present the Web of Venom: Carnage Born #1 Fine Art Print!  The madness of Cletus Kasady as Carnage is displayed here in this stunning variant cover art by Lucio Parrillo. Marvel's most diabolical symbiote lunges forward animal-like in what is a perfect depiction of a being so appropriately called Carnage...  Limited to only 125, don't miss out on adding this print to your Marvel gallery today!
